prompt: Create a complete UI component design board for a Flutter design system named Animal Island, in Chinese guofeng hand-drawn doodle style, DAY theme. Include these component groups as polished product UI mocks: buttons primary default dashed text link loading disabled danger, input fields normal hover focus error warning disabled, select dropdown, tabs, slider, switch, checkbox group, card, badge, modal, bottom sheet, date time picker, status views loading empty error, code block, divider, pull-to-refresh and load-more footer. Style direction: contemporary Chinese guochao mixed with casual hand-drawn doodle, uneven ink outlines, subtle paper texture, ink wash mountains, auspicious cloud curls, bamboo leaf scribbles, lantern-red accents, jade teal, cinnabar red, ink brown, warm rice paper background. Keep components practical and implementable, with clear states, consistent spacing, 2-3px irregular brush borders, soft flat shadows, readable labels. Use no marketing hero, no decorative cards around the whole page, just an organized design-system artboard with labeled sections. Add small implementation callouts in Chinese: token colors, border width, radius, shadows, painter strategy, theme day/night support. Make every control visually inspectable and not overlapping.
style: high fidelity UI design board, hand-drawn Chinese guofeng doodle, modern product component library, ink outline, paper grain, clean grid
palette: day theme: rice paper #F7F0DE, ink brown #5C3A21, cinnabar #C83B2D, jade teal #1C9C8E, bamboo green #4E8B45, imperial gold #D9A441, muted cloud blue #6F93B7
materials: rice paper texture, brush ink, watercolor wash, handmade sticker edges, subtle grain
constraints: 2048x1152, all text readable, no cropped components, no overlapping UI, black and white day/night theme tokens must be obvious, practical Flutter implementation annotations
negative: photorealistic screenshots, glossy 3D, western fantasy, neon cyberpunk, dense clutter, illegible text, random fake app screens, dark theme

prompt: Detailed DAY theme component spec sheet for Animal Island Flutter UI, focusing on forms and controls in Chinese guofeng hand-drawn doodle style. prompt: Create a practical implementation map image for bringing a Chinese guofeng hand-drawn doodle UI theme into the existing Animal Island Flutter component library. Show a split DAY and NIGHT theme token board, then component mapping for lib/src/components: AnimalButton, AnimalInput, AnimalSwitch, AnimalSlider, AnimalTabs, AnimalSelect, AnimalModal, AnimalBottomSheet, AnimalCard, AnimalStatusView, AnimalDateTimePicker, AnimalDivider, AnimalCodeBlock, AnimalFooter. Include readable Chinese notes: add AnimalIslandGameStyle.guofengDoodle, add AnimalIslandThemeSpec.guofengDoodle, add AnimalIslandThemeData.guofengDay and guofengNight, extend theme strategies with guofeng branch, create GuofengInkOutlinePainter and GuofengPaperTexturePainter, use CustomPaint overlay for irregular outline and cloud focus ring, keep existing public API unchanged. Visual style: technical design board with hand-drawn guofeng annotations, rice paper on left and midnight paper on right, brush arrows, token swatches, component thumbnails, implementation checklist.
style: technical UI implementation board, Chinese guofeng hand drawn doodle, Flutter design system, readable annotations
palette: split day and night palettes, jade, cinnabar, gold, ink brown, midnight indigo, moon paper
materials: paper texture, brush ink, marker doodle, watercolor wash
constraints: all implementation text readable, clean architecture diagram, no fake code blocks that dominate, no overlapping elements
